title: Klirun
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''klirun''' was a high-tension projectile [[Bow/Legends|bow]] that was the traditional hunting weapon of the [[Tunroth]]. It became so revered by the species that it was considered a sacred weapon.

Weighting around 3.5 kg, the powerful hunting bow was built with a recurve so that it remained bow-shaped even when unstrung. Designed for Tunroth strength, the bow had a heavy pull, and was capable of piercing [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Stormtrooper armor/Legends|armor]]. The bows used [[caros arrow]]s, which were occasionally tipped with [[talar]], a stunning agent that enabled non-lethal strikes.
